code: import{useRef,useEffect,useState}from"react";import{useDispatch,useSelector}from"react-redux";import{initializeBlogs}from"../reducers/blogReducer";import Togglable from"./Togglable";import BlogForm from"./BlogForm";import{Link}from"react-router-dom";import{Table,TableBody,TableCell,TableContainer,TableRow,Paper,TextField}from"@mui/material";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const BlogList=()=>{const dispatch=useDispatch();const[filter,setFilter]=useState("");useEffect(()=>{dispatch(initializeBlogs());},[dispatch]);const blogs=useSelector(state=>state.blogs);const blogFormRef=useRef();const filtered=[...blogs].filter(blog=>blog.title.toLowerCase().includes(filter.toLowerCase())||blog.author.toLowerCase().includes(filter.toLowerCase())).sort((a,b)=>b.likes-a.likes);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"blogs",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{id:"new-blog-btn",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Togglable,{buttonLabel:"new blog",ref:blogFormRef,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(BlogForm,{})})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(TextField,{label:"search blogs",size:"small",value:filter,onChange:e=>setFilter(e.target.value),sx:{my:1}}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(TableContainer,{id:"bloglist",component:Paper,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Table,{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(TableBody,{children:filtered.map(blog=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(TableRow,{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(TableCell,{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Link,{to:"/blogs/".concat(blog.id),children:[blog.title," - ",blog.author]})})},blog.id))})})})]});};export default BlogList;
